title: gossypium barbadense var. marie-galante
intro: Gossypium barbadense var. marie-galante is a variety of the Gossypium barbadense plant, commonly known as Pima cotton, which is a type of cotton plant that produces extra-long staple (ELS) cotton fibers. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Gossypium barbadense var. marie-galante include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in wound healing. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically to harness its medicinal properties.
